Workflow:
1. Search for Bounty Opportunities
2. Rapid Bounty Evaluation
3. Evaluate Bounty
4. Prerequisites (star repo)
5. Fork, Clone, Implement
6. Submit PR
7. Add Payment Address
8. Monitor

Safety Limits: Max 3 bounties per run. Skip T3 Code. Only unassigned issues.
